critic_notes: Four Windows-Clients questions. Q002/Q004 pass cleanly. Q001 (A4 Telemetrie) and Q003 (A6 Integration von Online-Konten) flag for PDF line-break artifacts: the source has `Telemetrie-\nLevel` and `Online-\nKonten` which normalize to `TelemetrieLevel`/`OnlineKonten` (no hyphen) while the quote retains the hyphen — matches under aggressive no-hyphen-no-space normalization. Content is faithful.

issues.detail: Fragment `Um die Übertragung von Diagnose- und Nutzungsdaten an Micros...` — PDF line-break artifact (hyphen/whitespace drift); matches under aggressive no-hyphen-no-space normalization.
Fragment `Online-Konten zur Anmeldung, etwa ein Microsoft-Konto oder K...` — PDF line-break artifact (hyphen/whitespace drift); matches under aggressive no-hyphen-no-space normalization.
